rationale: Educ. Code §7.025 governs the YMCA account funded via Transportation Code §502.299. It has no relation to Tax Code §11.13(b) residence homestead exemption amounts or property tax revenue.
quote: The account is composed of money deposited to the credit of the account under Section 502.299, Transportation Code, as added by Chapter 433, Acts of the 76th Legislature, Regular Session, 1999.
_note: No conflict; the cited statute addresses an unrelated general revenue fund account with no connection to homestead exemption levels.
